title: Crevice Cleaning Brush,6 PCS Bathroom, Toilet, Kitchen, Window Door Groove and Crevice Deep Cleaner Brush,Multifunctional Cleaning Tool
features: 【Multi-purpose】 This useful brush is practical for cleaning detailed parts, rugged and durable, easy to clean small narrow spaces, such as tiles gap in wall, toilet, kitchen, track of window or door, dead corners of sink or bathtub, keyboard seams,lunchbox gaskets and more, meet your different cleaning needs.
【high-Efficient crevice cleaning tool】 Flat brush head design can conveniently reaching deep into crevices or grooves,easily reach to the dead corners.

【Anti-skip Handle Design】 The curved design of the brush head and the evenly curved lines design of handles, which effectively reduces the grip of the hand and make the user feel comfortable and easy to use it.

【Easy to Wash&Store】Simply rinse the gap brush under running water or give it a quick wipe to remove any residue. There has a small hole in the handle end of the brush that can be hung up out of use, save the spaces, and easy to find out.

【Package Includes】 You will get 6Pcs of gap cleaning brushes set in total, enough quantity can meet your daily use and replacement needs, you can also share this household Little Tool with other people who need them
